name: save_constraints_as
short_description: Save current design's constraints as a new set of constraints files
full_help:
save_constraints_as

Description: 
Save current design's constraints as a new set of constraints files

Syntax: 
save_constraints_as  [-dir <arg>] [-target_constrs_file <arg>] [-quiet]
                     [-verbose] <name>

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-dir]                  Directory to save constraints to
  [-target_constrs_file]  Target constraints file for the new fileset
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>                  Name of the new constraints fileset

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Target constraints file for the new fileset
Suspend message limits during command execution
